title: Find The Cow
description: A cozy logic puzzle. Place one cow in every row, every column and every colored region so that no two cows ever touch, not even diagonally. Every level has a single solution you can deduce step by step: mark the cells you can rule out, then place each cow exactly right. You have 3 lives and the grid grows from a gentle 5x5 up to a brain-bending 10x10.
controls: Tap a cell to toggle an X (hold and drag to mark several); double-tap to place a cow, which locks in place.
